description: Baseline — 1456 KB total JS bundle

asi.hypothesis: baseline measurement

description: modularizeImports for lucide-react — no change, already tree-shaken

asi.hypothesis: lucide-react modularizeImports would reduce bundle
asi.result: no effect, likely already tree-shaken by Next.js

description: remove react-qr-code unused dep — no bundle change

asi.hypothesis: remove unused react-qr-code from deps
asi.result: no effect on bundle, was already tree-shaken out

description: stub auth-client — 8KB reduction but breaks ConvexBetterAuthProvider prerender

asi.hypothesis: stub out better-auth client to remove from bundle
asi.result: too invasive — ConvexBetterAuthProvider internally needs useSession, signIn.social etc. Build fails at prerender stage
asi.problem: Cannot safely stub auth client without mocking full better-auth API surface

description: compress: true — no effect on static bundle size

asi.hypothesis: compress: true would reduce JS file sizes
asi.result: compress only affects HTTP response compression, not static file sizes

description: experimental.optimizePackageImports — 120KB reduction (-8.2%)

asi.hypothesis: optimizePackageImports for heavy packages (lucide-react, better-auth, radix, etc)

description: swcMinify — deprecated in Next.js 16

asi.hypothesis: swcMinify would improve minification
asi.result: swcMinify removed in Next.js 16, already default

description: more optimizePackageImports — no additional reduction

asi.hypothesis: add more packages to optimizePackageImports (hookform, zod, next-themes, tailwind-merge)
asi.result: no additional reduction, packages already tree-shaken

description: webpack splitChunks for better-auth — build error, no size benefit

asi.hypothesis: webpack splitChunks to separate better-auth into its own chunk
asi.result: build error (duplicate type), splitChunks doesn't reduce total size anyway - just reshuffles chunks

description: reactCompiler: false + clean up webpack junk — 1328KB (-8KB from best)

asi.hypothesis: reactCompiler: false would remove compiler runtime overhead from bundle
asi.result: 8KB reduction (1336->1328), also cleaned up leftover webpack config junk from previous failed experiment

description: cacheComponents: false — no change

asi.hypothesis: cacheComponents: false might reduce client bundle
asi.result: no effect, same 1328KB

description: optimizePackageImports @better-fetch/fetch — no change

asi.hypothesis: add @better-fetch/fetch to optimizePackageImports
asi.result: no change, already optimized by better-auth entry

description: verification run — 1328KB confirmed stable

asi.hypothesis: verification run to confirm 1328KB is stable
asi.result: confirmed stable at 1328KB, no noise variance

description: ppr: incremental — merged into cacheComponents in Next.js 16

asi.hypothesis: experimental.ppr: incremental would enable PPR and reduce JS
asi.result: PPR merged into cacheComponents in Next.js 16 — already enabled

description: inlineCss: true — no change

asi.hypothesis: inlineCss: true would reduce JS by inlining styles
asi.result: no change, CSS already separate from JS

description: optimizeCss: true — no JS change

asi.hypothesis: optimizeCss: true for Tailwind CSS optimization
asi.result: no JS change, CSS optimization doesn't affect JS bundle

description: remove turbopack config — no effect on production build

asi.hypothesis: removing turbopack config from next.config might reduce production bundle
asi.result: no effect, turbopack config only used in dev mode

description: output: standalone — no JS change (server-only optimization)

asi.hypothesis: output: standalone might enable more aggressive tree-shaking
asi.result: no change, standalone only affects server-side dependency tracing

description: lazy load authClient — +8KB worse (lazy overhead, no reduction)

asi.hypothesis: lazy load authClient via React.lazy + Suspense to defer better-auth
asi.result: +8KB worse (1328->1336). Lazy loading doesn't reduce total — just adds Suspense boundary overhead. Chunks still all exist.

description: delete 13 unused UI components — no change (already tree-shaken)

asi.hypothesis: delete 13 unused UI component files (alert-dialog, dialog, form, drawer, sonner, etc) to remove from module graph
asi.result: no change, tree-shaking was already perfect — unused files had zero bundle impact

description: browserslist modern targets — no change (Next.js 16 ignores it)

asi.hypothesis: browserslist targeting modern browsers would reduce polyfills (112KB)
asi.result: no change, Next.js 16 likely uses its own polyfill strategy regardless of browserslist
